Package com.sun.identity.console.base

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AMServiceProfile  
    AMViewInterface  
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AMAdminFrameViewBean  
    AMBaseServlet
    AMBaseServlet is the Module Servlet of base URI context.
    AMConsoleConfig  
    AMDelimitAttrTokenizer  
    AMInvalidURLViewBean
    AMInvalidURLViewBean is invoked when Module Servlet gets an invalid URL.
    AMLoginViewBean
    This view bean takes a login URL and make sure that login page occupies the entire browser.
    AMLogoutCommand
    Handles the event when the logout button is clicked.
    AMPipeDelimitAttrTokenizer  
    AMPostViewBean
    This view bean bridges view beans from two deployment domains.
    AMPrimaryMastHeadViewBean
    This is the base class for all view beans that have primary masthead in Console.
    AMPropertySheet
    This class provides convenient methods to get and set attribute values to property sheet view.
    AMServiceProfileViewBeanBase  
    AMShowMenuEntry  
    AMTabEntry  
    AMTableTiledView  
    AMUncaughtExceptionViewBean
    AMUncaughtExceptionViewBean displays a message box when uncaught exception is thrown.
    AMViewBeanBase
    This is the base class for all view beans in Console.
    AMViewConfig  
    AuthenticatedViewBean
    This view just display a message indicating that user has authenticated.
    BlankTabViewBean  
    CloseWindowViewBean
    This view just closes the browser window.
    ConsoleServletBase
    This is the base class for all the module servlets.
    DynamicRequestViewBean
    This view bean handles dynamic requests made from the client.
    MessageViewBean
    This view just display a message.
    OrderedListComparator  
    PageTrail
    This class captures a chain of markers where each marker contains information on the page session needed to activate view bean.
    PageTrailManager
    This singleton class governs the tracking of page trail per user session.
    VersionViewBean
    This class displays the version information page.
